other_observers: Andrew Shaum, Ty Shaum; This bird had been found a week earlier.  I know Glenn Walbek also observed the bird, with others.
description: Warbler sized bird. Yellow below with faint brown streaking from side of breast down flank.  Facial pattern: Yellow supercilium, cheek and chin. Dark eye line, and a brown streak from base of bill across cheek, ear and to the nape.  Not a good look at upper, but generally soft gray/brown.Behaviors: Silently caring what appeared to be cottonwood seeding to line nest. It would return to the nest about every 2-3 minutes.Call: silentPlumage: Adult
